name: QuickDownload
description: Adds a quality-selection download button to Jellyfin item detail pages.
overview: Download movies and episodes directly from the detail page. Choose transcoded quality (H.264/AAC) or download the original file. Requires the File Transformation companion plugin (>= v2.2.1.0) for permission-safe script injection.

versions.changelog:
Cache-bust plugin.js on injection

Add a ?v={assembly version} query to the injected plugin.js script tag so
browsers reload the script after a plugin upgrade instead of serving a stale
cached copy. First release cut via the new fully tag-driven release pipeline.
